name: John Doe
summary: Full-stack software engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable APIs and data-driven web applications. Proficient in Python, FastAPI, and React. Strong background in system design and cross-functional collaboration.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built a real-time attendance system using face recognition (DeepFace + FastAPI), reducing manual tracking effort by 80%.
Designed and deployed RESTful APIs serving 10,000+ daily requests with <200ms p99 latency.
Led migration of monolithic codebase to microservices, improving deployment frequency by 3x.
Mentored 2 junior engineers and conducted weekly code reviews.

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Developed a React dashboard for real-time analytics, cutting report generation time from 2 hours to 5 minutes.
Integrated third-party payment gateway (Razorpay), enabling 500+ transactions/day.
Wrote unit and integration tests achieving 85% code coverage.

projects.name: Job Application Automation Agent
projects.description: LangGraph-based AI agent that autonomously navigates job portals, fills application forms using Playwright, and generates tailored CVs using an LLM.

projects.name: AI Attendance System
projects.description: End-to-end face recognition pipeline for college attendance using DeepFace, FastAPI, and Next.js with a Prisma/PostgreSQL backend.

cover_letter: I am genuinely excited to apply for this role. Throughout my career I have focused on building systems that are not just functional but reliable and scalable at real-world traffic. I thrive in fast-paced environments and bring a strong bias toward shipping clean, well-tested code. I would love the opportunity to bring this energy to your team.
